title: Monster Tapes
overview: The Tape Was Real. The Monster Was Worse  Genre: Horror, Sci-Fi, Mystery, Action.  After a blogger’s monster video goes viral, he mysteriously disappears in the wilderness. Two girls set out to debunk the monster as not real, and that the disappearance was staged. They find more than a mystery and tapes. They find armed soldiers covering up a monstrous experiment gone wrong.
